column1:
Note: 1. The newly built commercial residential online contract signing sales data published this time is sourced from the Dongguan Housing and Urban-Rural Development Bureau, while the second-hand residential online contract signing sales data is sourced from the Dongguan Real Estate Registration Center.  
    2. The data statistics period for this time is from June 1 to 30, 2022, and the average sales price is rounded to the nearest whole number.  
    3. The statistical scope of towns and streets includes 4 street offices, 28 towns, and the Songshan Lake High-Tech Zone across the city.  
    4. The sales unit count and area data of newly built commercial residential properties for the city as a whole and for each town, street (industrial park) include the co-built affordable housing. To avoid significant anomalies in housing price data, the co-built affordable housing has been excluded when statistically calculating the average sales price of newly built commercial residential properties.  
    5. When contracts for newly built commercial residential properties or second-hand residential properties are terminated or revoked, the relevant data needs to be adjusted. Therefore, there may be slight differences in data statistics at different points in time.
